headline: Is Globe Life Inc. (GL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Globe Life Inc. on TradersPro’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GL. Globe Life Inc.’s share was trading at $166.76 as of June 12th. GL’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.54 and 10.44 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Jim Cramer Says “Globe Life Represents What I Call Value”
summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer noted the company’s valuation, as he commented: Next, we go back to sleep because the next one’s a financial services company called Globe Life, which sells supplemental health insurance and life insurance […]
